name: pike-language-server
description: Language support for Pike — diagnostics, completion, go-to-definition, hover, references, rename, formatting, and more

semanticTokenTypes.description: Built-in Pike functions provided by the runtime or predef

semanticTokenModifiers.description: Mutable variables that can be reassigned

pike.languageServer.path.description: Path to the Pike binary. Must be Pike 8.0 or newer.

pike.languageServer.maxNumberOfProblems.description: Maximum number of diagnostic problems reported per file.

pike.languageServer.backgroundIndex.enab.description: Enable background workspace indexing on startup. Disabling speeds up startup but cross-file features (go-to-definition, hover on inherited symbols) won't work until you open the files manually.

pike.languageServer.backgroundIndex.batc.description: Number of files indexed concurrently during background indexing. Higher values use more memory but finish faster. Lower values reduce memory pressure on constrained machines.

pike.languageServer.worker.requestTimeou.description: Timeout (ms) for individual Pike worker requests. Increase for complex codebases that hit timeouts.

pike.languageServer.worker.idleTimeoutMs.description: Idle timeout (ms) before the Pike worker subprocess is killed. Set to 0 to keep it alive indefinitely.

pike.languageServer.worker.maxRequestsBe.description: Force-restart the Pike worker after this many requests, to mitigate memory leaks. Set to 0 to disable.

pike.languageServer.worker.maxActiveMinu.description: Force-restart the Pike worker after this many minutes of activity. Set to 0 to disable.

pike.languageServer.worker.niceValue.description: CPU niceness for the Pike worker on Linux (0–19). Set to 0 to disable. Higher values reduce CPU contention on shared machines.

pike.languageServer.format.insertFinalNe.description: Insert a final newline when formatting.

pike.languageServer.format.operatorSpaci.description: Add spaces around operators when formatting.

pike.languageServer.trace.server.description: Controls the verbosity of LSP protocol tracing to the Output channel. Useful for debugging.
